structure_patterns: Narrative flows as a continuous block of text without explicit paragraph breaks, blending environmental description, internal thought, and action.
hint_patterns: Embeds a clear objective and narrative hook within the character's memory recovery, guiding the player toward the central plot.
formatting_preferences: Uses bold headers for turn identification and standard paragraph structure for the narrative body.
tone: Atmospheric and immersive; uses sensory details (cold, fog, throbbing pain) and internal monologue to establish mood.
